mnemonics: FATEN - Foundational Models, AI Ethics, Transformers, Explainable AI, Neural Networks
keyPoints: Understand the architecture and applications of Transformer models
Be able to critically evaluate the ethical implications of AI systems
Know the difference between various neural network types and their use cases
commonMistakes: Confusing supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning paradigms
Overlooking the ethical and societal impacts while focusing solely on technical aspects
Mixing up the components of transformer architecture (e.g., self-attention vs. encoder-decoder structure)
